programme.title: Innerspace
programme.desc: A test pilot is miniaturized in a secret experiment and accidentally injected into a hapless store clerk

programme.title: Perry Mason The case of the reckless romeo
programme.desc: Sleazy talk show host Ted Mayne has a tell-all book that enrages prominent women One actress Roxanne Shield makes a televised death threat Ted is murdered and she is charged Witnesses say they saw her outside his apartment that night

programme.title: Dial M for Murder
programme.desc: Tony plans to murder his wife when he finds out that she had an affair with someone a year ago He blackmails an old college associate to execute the crime but things dont work out as planned

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Happy Harrison and his National Amateur Hour are screening for new talent and are holding public voting auditions through several radio stations including the valleys own Station K The winning performer of the Station K audition is to receive 200 Once Uncle Joe hears about the prize money he thinks that Steve and Billie Jo should enter Billie Jo loves the idea but Steve who had never even considered singing for money is less than enthusiastic But he agrees to perform with Billie Jo Sydney Sparks a talent agent who heard Steve and Billie Jo wants to represent them if they win the contest His plans are for them to go on the road as a nightclub act

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: As Pixleys Sheriff Crandall is on a fishing vacation Uncle Joe has made an arrangement with Sam the valleys justice of the peace to house kleptomaniac shoplifter Eustace Pockle at the hotel for 4 a day for a five day sentence or until the sheriffs return Despite Eustaces relatively harmless nature Kate doesnt like the idea but allows Eustace to stay Unfortunately for Kate and the hotel guests Uncle Joe treats the hotel more like a jail than a hotel Conversely Kate and the girls treat Eustace more like a hotel guest than a prisoner Eustace on the other hand treats the hotel like any other place somewhere to snatch trinkets Just as Sheriff Crandall has announced his early return to pick-up Eustace Eustace escapes from the Shady Rest which places Kate and Uncle Joe in some hot water They hope to be able to find him before Sheriff Crandall actually makes it back

programme.title: TBH 109
programme.desc: TBH 109

programme.title: Trilogy of Terror
programme.desc: The same woman Karen Black appears in three tales as a blackmailed teacher a tormented lover and opposite sisters

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A young football star begins to have nightmares about a serial killer called The Springwood Chopper after finding his last victim Each dream reveals more of the killer until he is blamed for the killings Now his girlfriend begins to experience the same dreamswho is the killer

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A married couple is trying to enjoy their anniversary However the husband is sure his wife is cheating on him

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: When an abusive agent learns that his sexy model of a girlfriend is cheating on him with a photographer he kills him and later kidnaps his girlfriend but soon learns the love is more powerful in death

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married Todd Fields teaches a high school photography class in a small quiet country town but aspires to work in a big city and gets led astray when he falls under the seductive spell of attractive new student Roseanne Lucas

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Lew Bridgeman and Joe Caldwell are two longtime best friends who served together in the Vietnam War Lew and Joe wind clashing with each other over Lews fetching wife Rae whom both men are in love with

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: In a run down hotel in a town where a slasher has killed 7 people Eric checks in after inquiring about Skorzeny He meets several people staying at the hotel including a man in black who reveals that he is also werewolf born in 1468

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric teams up with an elderly homeless man who is also a werewolf in an effort to defeat Remy But discovers that the Gray Wolf hungers for human flesh

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Determined to prevent Nick from taking all the glory for solving another murder case Schanke captures the killer on his own -- or so he thinks

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan investigate a series of murders at a concert hall only to discover that a violinist who was presumed dead may in fact be alive

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Mchale 318
programme.desc: Mchale 318

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter wants his men to pass a promotion test

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Klink reluctantly falls in with two other Kommandants plotting against Burkhalter Burkhalter finds out Now Hogan must step in before Stalag 13 loses Klink the military way - by firing squad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A mad scientist invites the castaways to his island where he hopes to conduct strange experiments on them

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Howells discover that they are not legally married But as The Skipper prepares to marry them in the lagoon a fight causes them to call off the wedding altogether

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The McCoys teach a wealthy couple the joys of simple living

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa thinks hes the life-of-the-party

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS is going to stop Smart from testifying against one of their agents

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max must hold a séance to get information from a dead informer

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Captain Grant and Trans Cal Truckings new strongman Cooley conspire to put Bear Enterprises out of business aided and abetted by a stranger with a secret

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The new kid on the block is having trouble fitting in so Mister Ed comes up with a plan to help him win friends

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: When Wilbur balks at buying a new car for Carol she hitches up a buggy to Mister Ed Ed then reports her to the SPCA

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan tricks Klink into calling forth a bomber for study but it arrives with a complication - a German general familiar with Hogans style

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Klink reluctantly falls in with two other Kommandants plotting against Burkhalter Burkhalter finds out Now Hogan must step in before Stalag 13 loses Klink the military way - by firing squad

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Bubblecrafts rise out of the waters Bubblemen are directed by Brotak to kidnap Zandor and TaraAndropon sends his robots to attack the Herculoids only to be defeated Zandor accepts his challenge as he sends his best warrior Ogron

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Stench an agent of MAD has invented a substance that makes gold smell terrible making it valueless Inspector Gadget guards the national gold reserve at Fort Bucks

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget protects a man who knows too much

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: WKRP 103

programme.title: The Wizard of Speed and Time
programme.desc: A Hollywood filmmaker Mike Jittlov makes a short for an evil film studio Unbeknownest to him the producer has placed a bet of 25000 that he wont come up with anything with a use Luckily our film creator gets the help of his friends

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke are skinny-dipping in a local pond when two pool hustlers steal both the cousins clothing and the General Lee Rosco soon pursues who he thinks are the Duke boys but the crooks drive the stolen General Lee into the lake When nobody is found with the car Rosco tearfully announces that Bo and Luke have drowned Bo and Luke arrive home safe and sound then learn that Boss has used their alleged deaths to implicate them on the theft of his gold watch so he can fraudulently collect the insurance money The Duke boys and Cooter concoct a scheme to turn the General Lee into a ghost and haunt Boss and Rosco until they admit their scheme

programme.title: Hercules 110
programme.desc: Hercules 110

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: The Liberation sends a team to destroy the scarecrow probe before the Taelons crack it Joshua Doors is appointed as secretary of Human-Taelon relations

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: War of the Worlds

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Alpha is on the verge of being destroyed by intense shockwaves emanating from a planet they are approaching The Alphans land on the planet seemingly devoid of any human existence but being run by a group of machines The machines explain to the visitors that their human overlords are in a state of regeneration but the chief machine the Guardian sees the Alphans as a threat and it is down to two newly regenerated females known as A and B to decide their fates

programme.title: Timerider The Adventure of Lyle Swann
programme.desc: Motorcycle racer Lyle Swann Fred Ward is cruising through the Mexican desert when he accidentally stumbles into a time-travel experiment and finds himself transported back to the Old West of the 1870s There he encounters an attractive local woman Belinda Bauer and a gang of criminals led by Porter Reese Peter Coyote Lyles motorized bike is impressive in the past -- until it runs out of gas Now Lyle must rely on his wits to take care of business and return to his own time

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: Victoria poses as a thief in order to become an inmate and investigate conditions at a womens prison Once in she finds it is a miserable place and that she may never be able to leave

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne rides into Paradise Springs the town of friendly people When hes greeted with fists instead and has to stand trial he finds the judges wife knows more than shes telling but he remembers her too but doesnt know why

programme.desc: Young 318

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A detective David Soul investigating a murder becomes convinced a suspect is indeed guilty; guest A Martinez

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: A prince the absolute ruler of a principality has 15 million which he plans to use for arms to wage war on a neighboring oil-rich country Briggs devises a scheme that involves breaking the bank of the princes casino First the IMF will utilize a computer to take 200000 at roulette That will provide the stake the IMF needs to take the prince at a high-stakes game of baccarat

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon work the hospital round They are called to talk to a mentally-challenged man who threatens to blow up a radio station

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimbles current boss A warehouse owner with a terminal disease wants to help Dr Kimble by impersonating him leading Lt Gerald to the Country of Greece and dying at sea

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: While returning to Stockton Victoria and Jarrod stop in a town with outrageous prices for food lodging and services After finding out the people are bilking travelers to survive the Barkleys decide to open a shipping business to save the town-despite opposition from a territorial boss with a rival freight company in the area

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: In this episode, Melissa Croden speaks about some of the things she struggles with as a fighter and how she overcomes those obstacles. Find out how Melissa started out this fight with nerves and anxiety but how she pulled out a huge win against Brittany Paterson.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Kes Mamba v. Wesley Johnson

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Chris Smeltzer's journey into MMA began 12 years ago, through Karate. Chris' work as a School Bus driver fits perfectly with his MMA lifestyle, allowing him the flexibility to train throughout the day, as well run a karate school for kids. The martial artist lifestyle helped bring structure to all areas of Chris' life. He believes he has become a better person through Martial Arts, and he makes the mental distinction between between being a fighter and being Martial Artist. He prefers the standup game feels he is progressing well to being an all around fighter with his BJJ Blue Belt.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Main Event - Sheldon Gaines v. Nate Smandych

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Alfie Davis v. Kostadin Enev

programme.desc: Lucia Krajcovic v. Sammy Lee Brown

programme.desc: Nick ""The Promise"" Ring has been training and competing in Martial Arts for 20 years. He reflects on his UFC career, martial arts, love of books and what's it like to be a father.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 44 kicks off with an Amateur Title Fight between wrestler Justin Basra and John 'The Dragon' Nguyen. This is followed by pros Zach Snyder vs. Kolton Menzak. Wrapping up this episode with the Main Event is Corey Devela vs. UFC Veteran Nick 'The Promise' Ring, who keeps going after five knee surgeries. You do not want to miss it!

programme.title: The April Taylor Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the lady whose upcoming celebrity tell all book will blow your mind Meet the lovely Ms April Taylor

programme.title: The Cynda Williams Interview
programme.desc: Meet the lady who became a star in the 1990s hit movie Mo Betta Blues Hear how selling herself out to become rich was and still isnt an option

programme.title: The Chico Brown Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: From being the Co-defendant to Rick Ross to becoming a successful film maker Chico Brown stops by the show to set the record straight

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master

programme.title: Dugeons Dragons
programme.desc: A terrifying creature called The Darkling has been kidnapping people for a thousand years A few more victims will give him the power to take over the entire Realm The team must stop The Darkling but he is too much for them

programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village
